summary: Action refs not SHA-pinned (@v4 vs full commit SHA). Script: JSON generation lacks escaping—risks injection if package names contain quotes (generate_json_report). Regex parsing fragile for edge cases (parse_package_json lines 78–90, parse_requirements_txt lines 100–110). Verbose IFS save/restore pattern (load_*_list functions). Missing: actionlint validation proof, act-result.txt artifact requirement. Functional for mocked scenarios but unsuitable for production.
